name: ai-agent-sync
description: Cross-agent plugin to synchronize and manage skills, agents, and plugins using chezmoi.
defaultPrompt: If chezmoi is not yet installed or initialized, run the sync-dotfiles first-time setup ('초기 설정해줘') before using any other skill.
Use list-skills to see all skills across Claude, Gemini, and Codex.
Use manage-plugins to add or remove plugins per agent.
